title: Dopamine and reading
first_prompt: Is dopamine involved when we read?
summary: Irwin was trying to determine the neurological mechanisms involved in reading, specifically whether dopamine plays a role in the process, a question relevant to his project on literacy and deep reading. The conversation quickly shifted from the theoretical neuroscience to a technical problem: the assistant explained that due to the iPad's sandboxed nature, direct writing to the Postliterate vault was impossible. This led to the conclusion that the information would be drafted for copy-pasting, prompting the assistant to debate the appropriate file format—HTML versus Markdown—for the Obsidian vault.
